name: Analyse project codebase
description: Analyse the project in the current workspace: understand its architecture, tech stack, structure, key modules, dependencies, and overall design. Provide a comprehensive analysis of what this project does, how it's organized, and any notable patterns or conventions used.

goal.answer: Deliver a comprehensive inline analysis of the AI-Portfolio project — covering its architecture, tech stack, directory structure, key modules, dependencies, design patterns, content/CMS strategy, and animation system — with emphasis on the backend API and server structure. Include actionable recommendations for security, performance, and architecture/maintainability.

criteria.answer:
A structured inline chat analysis is delivered covering: high-level architecture, tech stack, directory organization, key frontend modules, and content/CMS strategy.
The backend API and Express server structure are analyzed with extra depth: endpoints, middleware, auth flow, file upload handling, and content CRUD patterns.
Actionable recommendations are included for at least three areas: security, performance, and architecture/maintainability.
All claims reference specific files and code snippets from the actual codebase (no hallucinated files or APIs).
The analysis accounts for the dual content-loading strategy (build-time Vite glob imports + runtime Express API) and the Decap CMS integration setup.

constraints.answer: Analysis must be delivered inline in chat, not as a saved file., Must include actionable recommendations, not just description., Backend API/server structure must receive extra analytical depth., All claims must be verifiable against actual source files.

assumptions.answer: The project is intended as a personal portfolio/archive site, not a production SaaS.; Security recommendations should be pragmatic given the personal-site context.; The user is open to architectural suggestions but may not act on all of them immediately.; The Decap CMS integration is intended for Git-backed content editing in production.; The dual content-loading strategy (build-time glob + runtime API) is intentional, not an accident.

phases.name: Analysis & Report
phases.goal: Read all key source files, synthesize findings, and deliver the comprehensive inline analysis with recommendations.
phases.description: Comprehensive codebase analysis covering architecture, frontend, backend, CMS, animations, and actionable recommendations. Delivered as a structured inline chat response.

steps.description: Read and analyze remaining key files: server.ts security surface, remaining page components, animation components, and content markdown samples.
Synthesize all findings into a structured analysis covering architecture, tech stack, directory organization, frontend modules, backend API, CMS strategy, animation system, and content model.
Identify and document actionable recommendations for security, performance, and architecture/maintainability with specific file references.
Deliver the final structured inline analysis to the user in chat.
